类的使用
org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ProtocolBuilder

  • 使用ProtocolBuilder的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap  
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders
    A bunch of builder classes to facilitate programming of raw API.

    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap中ProtocolBuilder的使用

      类型变量类型为ProtocolBuilder的org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap中的方法参数 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      DubboBootstrap DubboBootstrap.protocol(Consumer<ProtocolBuilder> consumerBuilder) 
      DubboBootstrap DubboBootstrap.protocol(String id, Consumer<ProtocolBuilder> consumerBuilder)
